description: Combined CLI for multiple API services

tools.name: blocks_delete
tools.description: Delete a block using its ID. Required: block_id. Returns the BlockResponse. Destructive.

params.name: block_id
params.description: The ID of the block to delete.

tools.name: blocks_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a block object using its ID. Required: block_id. Returns the BlockResponse.

params.name: block_id
params.description: The ID of the block to retrieve.

tools.name: blocks_update
tools.description: Update a block's properties. Required: block_id, type. Optional: properties. Returns the updated BlockResponse.

params.name: block_id
params.description: The ID of the block to update.

params.name: properties
params.description: The properties to update for the block.

params.name: type
params.description: The type of block (e.g., paragraph, image).

tools.name: children_retrieve-block
tools.description: Retrieve the children of a block. Required: block_id. Optional: start_cursor, page_size. Returns the BlockChildrenResponse.

params.name: block_id
params.description: The ID of the block whose children are to be retrieved.

params.name: start_cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next set of results.

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of results to retrieve per page (default is 100).

tools.name: children_update-block
tools.description: Update the children of a block. Required: block_id, children. Returns the updated BlockChildrenResponse.

params.name: block_id
params.description: The ID of the block to update.

params.name: children
params.description: The list of block children to update.

tools.name: notion-search_search
tools.description: Search for pages, databases, and other objects within a Notion workspace. Optional: filter, page_size, query (plus 2 more). Returns the new SearchResponse.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: start_cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for the start of the search results.

tools.name: pages_create
tools.description: Create a new page in a Notion database. Required: parent, properties. Optional: children. Returns the new PageResponse.

params.name: children
params.description: List of block objects for the page content.

tools.name: pages_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a page object using the page ID. Required: page_id. Returns the PageResponse.

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the page to retrieve.

tools.name: pages_update
tools.description: Update the properties of a specific page by its ID. Required: page_id, properties. Optional: archived. Returns the updated PageResponse.

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the page to update.

params.name: properties
params.description: The properties to update for the page.

tools.name: pages_properties_retrieve-page-property
tools.description: Retrieve a page property using the page ID and property ID. Required: page_id, property_id. Returns the PagePropertyResponse.

params.name: property_id
params.description: The ID of the property to retrieve.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text search across all synced data (SQLite FTS5). Faster than paginating list endpoints. Requires sync first.

tools.name: sql
tools.description: Run read-only SQL against the local database. Ad-hoc analysis, aggregations, and joins across synced resources. Requires sync first.

tools.name: context
tools.description: Get API domain context: resource taxonomy, auth requirements, query tips, and unique capabilities. Call this first.

tools.name: format-write-page
tools.description: Render an extended-markdown document to a Notion page, preserving block-level color and per-run annotation fidelity the official Notion MCP drops. Wraps internal/notionmd.

tools.name: format-update-block
tools.description: Re-style an existing block's formatting in place (color, annotations, callout icon, to_do checked) without retyping text. Wraps internal/notionmd.

params.name: md
params.description: Replace rich text from extended markdown.

tools.name: format-read-page
tools.description: Read a page's block tree and render it back to extended markdown (inverse of format-write-page), round-tripping color and annotations. Wraps internal/notionmd.

tools.name: sync-database
tools.description: Sync Notion API data into the local SQLite store for offline search and analysis. No remote mutation. Wraps internal/store.

tools.name: sync-page
tools.description: Mirror one page's full block tree into local SQLite with per-run color/annotation columns so format sql can query formatting. No remote mutation. Wraps internal/store.

tools.name: search-local
tools.description: Full-text search against the local SQLite mirror (FTS5), offline. Run sync-database first.

tools.name: workflow-run
tools.description: Run the compound archive workflow: fetch all syncable resources into the local SQLite store. No remote mutation.

tools.name: databases-create
tools.description: Create a database under a parent page. Required: parent, properties. Optional: title.

tools.name: databases-retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a database's metadata and property schema. Required: database_id.

tools.name: databases-update
tools.description: Update a database's title, description, or property schema. Required: database_id.

tools.name: databases-query
tools.description: Query a database's rows with optional filter and sorts. Required: database_id.

tools.name: comments-list
tools.description: List unresolved comments on a block or page. Required: block_id.

tools.name: comments-create
tools.description: Create a comment. Provide rich_text plus parent (new thread) or discussion_id (reply).

params.name: parent
params.description: Parent reference to start a thread.

tools.name: users-list
tools.description: List all users in the workspace.

tools.name: users-retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve a user by ID. Required: user_id.

tools.name: users-me
tools.description: Retrieve the bot user associated with the current integration token.

tools.name: pages-move
tools.description: Move a page to a new parent (page or database) by updating its parent reference. Required: page_id, parent.

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the page to move.

tools.name: pages-duplicate
tools.description: Duplicate a page: copies its properties and full block tree into a new page (Notion has no single duplicate endpoint). Required: page_id. Optional: parent.

params.name: page_id
params.description: The ID of the page to duplicate.

params.name: parent
params.description: Target parent; defaults to the source's parent.
